subcodes.first_line: Say: O Lord my God! I praise Thee for having caused me to turn toward the horizon of Thy bounty, the heaven of Thy grace and the ocean of Thy bestowals [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی احمدک بما جعلتنی مقبلا الی افق جودک و سماء فضلک و بحر عطائک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
